results.trackCensoredName: The Deal, The Mistake, The Score Books Bundle
results.trackName: The Deal, The Mistake, The Score Books Bundle
results.description:
The complete international bestselling Off-Campus series from New York Times bestselling author and TikTok sensation Elle Kennedy — all five books in one collection.
Welcome to Briar University, where the hockey players are cocky, charming, and about to fall hard. Fake dates, second chances, one wild rebound, and a love-at-first-sight goal — follow four unforgettable couples from first kiss to happily ever after across The Deal, The Mistake, The Score, The Goal, and the series finale, The Legacy.
